qa_result.question: What is the most likely scenario where this conversation takes place?
options: A. In a government office meeting room, relevant political personnel negotiate the crisis response plan after the education reform bill is leaked
B. In a private residence, relevant political personnel negotiate the crisis response plan after the education reform bill is leaked
C. In a TV studio, guests are recording a news interview program themed on education reform
qa_result.answer_text: In a government office meeting room, relevant political personnel negotiate the crisis response plan after the education reform bill is leaked
